headlines.title: South Carolina governor appoints Lindsey Graham’s sister to finish his Senate term
headlines.description: The announcement from Gov. Henry McMaster came after President Donald Trump recommended Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, for the temporary position.

headlines.title: Judge says Trump admin tried to ‘manipulate the judicial process’ with its IRS settlement
headlines.description: A federal judge in Florida has found President Donald Trump’s lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service was brought in “bad faith” for an “improper purpose.”

headlines.title: Tracking the DOJ's effort to get U.S. voter registration data
headlines.description: The Justice Department is seeking voter registration list data from all 50 states and the District of Columbia over the past year.

headlines.title: U.S. announces more strikes on Iran over Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: President Trump said that the United States will blockade Iran in the Strait of Hormuz and charge ships 20% for safe passage. Central Command announced that the U.S. has commenced strikes on Iran for the third straight night. NBC News' Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Appointment of Lindsey Graham's sister to Senate a 'fitting tribute’: Former South Carolina governor
headlines.description: Fmr. Gov. Mark Sanford (R-S.C.) joins Meet the Press NOW to react to the sudden and unexpected death of Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-S.C.). Sanford discusses Senator Graham's legacy on Capitol Hill and his role as a liaison between President Trump and the Senate.

headlines.title: S.C. Gov McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone to fill Sen. Lindsey Graham's seat
headlines.description: South Carolina Governor Henry McMaster appoints Darline Graham Nordone, Sen. Lindsey Graham's younger sister, to serve the remainder of the late Republican senator's term, which ends early January 2027.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Republicans scramble to find a replacement for Sen. Lindsey Graham ahead of the midterm elections
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told NBC News he has someone in mind he’d like to replace the late South Carolina senator but declined to name the person.

headlines.title: Mitch McConnell says he suffered fall, was unconscious in first statement since hospitalization
headlines.description: McConnell, R-Ky., said he would return to the Senate but didn’t give a date.

headlines.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham dies at 71 after ‘brief and sudden illness’
headlines.description: President Donald Trump led tributes to Graham, a leading Republican voice on defense and foreign policy, describing him as a “true American Patriot.”

headlines.title: Trump says he spoke with Sen. Lindsey Graham hours before his death
headlines.description: The president said the South Carolina Republican called him to discuss the SAVE America Act: “He sounded a little tired, but perfect.”

headlines.title: Graham Platner officially withdraws from the Maine Senate race
headlines.description: Embattled candidate Graham Platner officially dropped out of Maine’s U.S.
